title: CAM advises Healthcare Global Enterprises on ₹424 crore rights issue
description: Healthcare Global Enterprises Limited, India's largest cancer care network, has made a rights issue of equity shares aggregating to approximately ₹424.6818 crore.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised Healthcare Global Enterprises, offering in-depth counsel on all significant aspects of the rights issue.The transaction team was led by Yash J Ashar (Senior Partner), Reuben Chacko (Partner, Regional Co-Head - Capital Markets - South) and Abhyuday Bhotika (Partner), with support from Associates Surya Ra
